reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención , Especialmente los playeros Renovando papel en los baños . Muy Amables Los chicos ! Lugar Elegido Siempre para Tomar un Buen descanso a la sombrita , Comprar algo Rico O fresco . Y Luego seguir ruta ! 😉

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, especially the beach attendants. They're renewing the wallpaper in the bathrooms. The guys are very friendly! Always a great place to take a nice break in the shade, buy something delicious or fresh, and then continue on your way! 😉

reviews.comment:
De paso para carga de combustible. Una buena y cálida atención del personal.
Lo fundamental, posee posta para cargar agua caliente el mate y completo servicio ahora poder desayunar y/merendar. Baños en condiciones y espacio suficiente para estacionar y hacer una parada.
Usualmente concurrido.

(Translated by Google)
A stop for fuel. The staff is friendly and helpful.
Most importantly, it has a station for getting hot water for mate and a full service, so you can now have breakfast or an afternoon snack. The restrooms are in good condition and there's enough space to park and stop. Usually busy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtcVl1azNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar es lindo, la atención de las chicas es muy buena pero los precios son un verdadero acto delictivo. Tomé hoy un café con leche con medialunas y me cobraron 850 pesos… Un verdadero robo!!

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice, the service is great, but the prices are downright criminal. I had a coffee with milk and croissants today and they charged me 850 pesos... A real rip-off!
